description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release that triggers on push events with tags. For a specific repository owner, set up .NET SDKs (3.1.x, 5.0.x, 6.0.x, 7.0.x, 8.0.x, and 9.0.x preview), Node.js 16.x, then package and publish .NET projects to NuGet using a provided API key, and upload the package artifact.
